parameters-en.Decay: Adjusts the decay time of the reverb effect.
parameters-en.Predelay: Controls the amount of delay heard before the audible onset of reverb. Can sometimes result in more definition between the dry and effected signals.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the tonal balance of the reverb. Lower values are darker, higher values are brighter.
parameters-en.Modulation: Controls the amount of modulation applied to the reverb.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the reverb and the dry signal. At 0%, no reverb is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
